argument_quality_notes.linguistic: Agent did not debate; provided no candidates.
argument_quality_notes.landscape: Agent did not debate; provided plausible arguments based on visible infrastructure and vegetation.
argument_quality_notes.botanics: Agent did not debate; correctly identified vegetation as non-diagnostic.
argument_quality_notes.regulatory: Agent did not debate; correctly identified visible infrastructure features.
argument_quality_notes.meta: Agent did not debate; correctly identified architectural features.

verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus in Round 1 (all agents listed Mexico as a candidate) and terminated the process. No pairings were necessary.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the consensus on Mexico but provided a flawed count of agent mentions (claiming Guatemala and Colombia were mentioned by 4 and 3 agents respectively, when they were only mentioned by 3 and 3 agents). However, the final conclusion was correct.
